message:
feat(ci): pre-compile frozen_functions.o to skip 18min build

- Add scripts/build-frozen.sh to compile .o with hash tracking
- Add update-frozen.yml workflow to auto-update on opcode/polyfill changes
- Modify build.zig to use pre-compiled .o if available (mtime check)
- Update .gitignore to track .o and .sha256 files
- Update setup-edgebox cache key to include frozen files

This allows CI and local builds to skip the slow clang compilation
of frozen_functions.c (~18 min) by using a pre-compiled .o file.

files.patch:
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ runs:
           vendor/binaryen/
           vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux/build/
           vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/
-        key: edgebox-full-v3-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig', 'bench/*.js', 'src/polyfills/*.js') }}
+        key: edgebox-full-v4-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig', 'src/freeze/*.zig', 'bench/*.js', 'src/polyfills/*.js', 'zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.o') }}
 
     # === Build Binaryen (if cache miss) ===
     - name: Build Binaryen
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ runs:
       if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit != 'true' && inputs.build-benchmarks == 'true'
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        echo "Building all benchmarks (this takes ~10 min due to frozen function compilation)..."
+        echo "Building all benchmarks (fast if frozen_functions.o is pre-compiled)..."
         for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive; do
           echo "Building $bench..."
           ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/$bench.js

@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ concurrency:
 jobs:
   # 5 parallel benchmark jobs
   # All share the same setup cache (setup-edgebox caches ALL outputs including benchmarks)
+  # Note: update-frozen.yml handles frozen_functions.o updates separately
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60  # First run needs ~45 min (build deps + benchmarks), cached ~5 min

@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+name: Update Frozen Functions
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/freeze/**'
+      - 'src/polyfills/**'
+      - 'vendor/quickjs-ng/**'
+      - 'scripts/build-frozen.sh'
+  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger
+
+jobs:
+  update-frozen:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
+          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Check and update frozen_functions.o
+        run: |
+          # Check if .o exists and hash matches
+          if ./scripts/build-frozen.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "up-to-date"; then
+            echo "frozen_functions.o is up-to-date, skipping"
+          else
+            echo "frozen_functions.o needs update, compiling (~18 min)..."
+            ./scripts/build-frozen.sh
+          fi
+
+      - name: Commit if changed
+        run: |
+          if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.*)" ]; then
+            git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+            git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+            git add zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.o zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.sha256
+            git commit -m "chore: auto-update frozen_functions.o"
+            git push
+            echo "::notice::Committed updated frozen_functions.o"
+          else
+            echo "No changes to commit"
+          fi

@@ -1,8 +1,10 @@
 # Zig build artifacts
 zig-out/
-# Exception: commit SHARED frozen_functions.c (only changes when opcode handlers or polyfills change)
+# Exception: commit SHARED frozen_functions files (skip 18min compile time)
 !zig-out/cache/
 !zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.c
+!zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.o
+!zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.sha256
 zig-cache/
 .zig-cache/
